global_description: A medium-sized bird with a sleek, elongated body and glossy black plumage. It features a slender, slightly curved beak and bright yellow eyes. The feathers have an iridescent sheen, appearing bluish or greenish in certain lights.

part_details.plumage: Glossy black with iridescent blue-green sheen, smooth texture.
part_details.eyes: Bright yellow, small, and round, contrasting with dark feathers.
part_details.beak: Slender, slightly curved, black, and pointed.
part_details.body: Medium-sized, elongated, streamlined with smooth feather coverage.
part_details.wings: Long, narrow, black with subtle iridescence.

spatial_relations: The slender beak extends from the front of the head.
The bright yellow eyes are positioned on either side of the head.
The wings are attached to the sides of the elongated body.
